summary: Frontend testing completed for M2 Nuevo Predio Modal. All required functionalities verified: modal opens correctly, 3 tabs (Código Nacional, Propietario R1, Físico R2), 30-digit code constructor with municipality prefix pre-loaded, real-time code visualization, multiple propietarios support, zonas terreno and construcciones with add/remove functionality, automatic area calculation, Verificar Código button (fixed endpoint mismatch), and Agregar Predio button.

design_issues.screen: M2 Dialog and Nuevo Predio Modal
issues: Minor: React console warning - Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby` for DialogContent components

critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: API endpoint mismatch - verificar-codigo was calling non-existent endpoint, changed to verificar-codigo-completo
Fixed: Missing municipio query parameter in verificar-codigo-completo API call
updated_files: /app/frontend/src/pages/MutacionesResoluciones.js (2 fixes: API endpoint name and municipio param)
context_for_next_testing_agent: M2 Nuevo Predio Modal fully tested. All features working: 3 tabs (Código Nacional 30 dígitos, Propietario R1, Físico R2), municipality prefix pre-loaded (54498 for Ocaña), real-time code construction, multiple propietarios, zonas and construcciones with add/delete, automatic area calculation from R2 data, Verificar Código button functional (fixed endpoint), Agregar Predio button visible.

modal_structure.tab_codigo_nacional: PASS - Tab visible and active by default

tab1_codigo_nacional.editable_fields: PASS - Zona, Sector, Comuna, Barrio, Manzana, Terreno, Condición, Edificio, Piso, Unidad
tab1_codigo_nacional.verificar_codigo_button: PASS - Fixed endpoint, shows Código disponible

bugs_fixed_during_testing.root_cause: Frontend calling /api/predios/verificar-codigo/{codigo} but backend endpoint is /api/predios/verificar-codigo-completo/{codigo}
bugs_fixed_during_testing.fix: Changed API endpoint from verificar-codigo to verificar-codigo-completo

bugs_fixed_during_testing.root_cause: Backend endpoint requires municipio query parameter but frontend wasn't sending it
bugs_fixed_during_testing.fix: Added params: { municipio: municipioNombre } to axios.get call
